# criblio_global_var (Resource)

GlobalVar Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_global_var" "my_globalvar" {
  args = [
    {
      name = "val"
      type = "number"
    }
  ]
  description = "This is a test var."
  group_id    = "default"
  id          = "test_var"
  lib         = "custom"
  tags        = "test"
  type        = "number"
  value       = "100"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema


### Required

- `group_id` (String) Worker group ID.
- `id` (String) Global variable name
- `type` (String)


### Optional

- `args` (List of Object) Argument definitions for expression-type variables. Each item has type and name (e.g. for (val / 1073741824).toFixed(precision || 5)).
- `description` (String)
- `lib` (String)
- `tags` (String)
- `value` (String)


## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_global_var.my_criblio_global_var
  id = jsonencode({
    group_id = "default"
    id       = "ENV"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_global_var.my_criblio_global_var '{"group_id": "default", "id": "ENV"}'
```
